reasoning: The control RA-5 (8) focuses on vulnerability monitoring and scanning by reviewing historic audit logs. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to retain logs for analysis. Additionally, it involves ensuring that audit policies are set to capture necessary metadata for security reviews. Scheduling regular reviews of these logs aligns with the intent of reviewing historic audit logs for vulnerabilities.
title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning | Review Historic Audit Logs
